title: TRIENCY Soap Dispenser, Hand Sanitizer Dispenser Wall Mounted Manual 320ml, Hand Sanitiser Dispenser, Hand Wash, Hand Gel Dispenser, Bathroom Shower Gel, Shampoo, Bonus USE HAND SANITISER Sign Sticker
features: Multi-purpose: This manual Soap Dispenser is suitable for liquid, liquid-based hand sanitiser gel, hand soap, shampoo, body wash, lotion. Recommended for thin gel, Thick gel may cause blockage.
Features: The Hand Sanitizer Dispenser is refillable with clog-free pump design. Waterproof. Transparency refill tank. Wall-mounted design is great for space-saving.
Wide-refill-opening: This Hand Sanitiser Dispenser has large capacity which can contains up to 320ml of antibacterial liquid. Wide lid makes refills easy & quick, and spill-free.
High Durability: The Hand Gel Dispenser is made of ABS material which gives outstanding durability, impact resistance and chemical resistance. Less plastic waste & light material.
Bonus: A self-adhesive "Use Hand Sanitiser" sign to remind your kids, guests and the whole family to use hand sanitiser/ hand soap. Suitable for bathroom, kitchen, office, hotel, toilet, etc.
description: Product Description TRIENCY MANUAL SOAP DISPENSER WALL-MOUNTED 350ML PRODUCT INFORMATION TECHNICAL DETAILS Capacity: 350ml Material: ABS Size: 19.5 x 7.8 x 7.7 cm Item Weight: 197g PACKAGE INCLUDES 1 x Hand Sanitizer Dispenser 1 x "USE HAND SANITISER" sign sticker 1 x Set of 2 Anchors & 2 Screws This TRIENCY Soap Dispenser Manual Wall-mounted 350ml provides the most efficient and easy way to wash your hands — no germs left behind. MAIN FEATURE OF THIS HAND SANITIZER DISPENSER WALL MOUNTED Multiple-purpose design makes this dispenser suitable for most kinds of liquid hand sanitiser, hand soap, thin gel, shampoo. This allows you to keep your hands always clean with convenience & hygiene. BONUS: A " USE HAND SANITISER " sign sticker to remind your kids, guests and the whole family to use hand sanitiser / hand soap. PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS ABS MATERIAL Environmental ABS engineering plastic with electroplated finish, durable. REMOVABLE BACK-PLATE Easy to install with screws (included), keeping the dispenser safety lest fall down and saving space; Can be installed with double-sided tape (not included), no need for drilling. DISPENSE VALVE Specially designed valve prevents messy drip, dispenses the right amount of hand sanitiser liquid/ soap. BULK FILL TANK Transparent soap dispenser body, easy to see how much liquid left; Large capacity 350ml, quick and easy to refill. INSTALLATION LOCATION SUITABLE FOR MOST PLACES This Triency Soap Dispenser Wall-mounted design could fit in any spaces for space-saving, it's an ideal item to install in home bathroom, kitchen, office, school, hospital, hotel, restaurant, etc. TRIENCY Manual Hand Sanitizer Dispenser | Soap Dispenser Wall-Mounted TRIENCY Manual Soap Dispenser | Hand Sanitizer Dispenser Wall-mounted TRIENCY Automatic Hand Sanitizer Dispenser Wall-mounted TRIENCY Automatic Soap Dispenser | Hand Sanitizer Dispenser Wall-mounted TRIENCY Automatic Hand Sanitizer Dispenser Wall-Mounted with Drip Tray Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.0 out of 5 stars 882 4.6 out of 5 stars 69 3.6 out of 5 stars 16 4.4 out of 5 stars 64 3.6 out of 5 stars 50 Price £16.99 £ 16 . 99 — no data — no data — no data — no data AUTOMATIC X X ✓ ✓ ✓ CAPACITY 350 ml 1200 ml 1000ml 1200 ml 1200ml INSTALLATION Wall-mounted Wall-mounted Wall-mounted Wall-mounted Wall-mounted LIQUID TYPE All types (NOT recommended for THICK Gel) All types (NOT recommended for THICK Gel) All types (NOT recommended for THICK Gel) All types (NOT recommended for THICK Gel) All types (NOT recommended for THICK Gel)
